description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a matte green color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with a black bezel and a prominent notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a solid green with a silver Apple logo centered and a triple camera array in the top left corner, each lens encircled by a black ring. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or reinforced plastic, with no visible buttons or ports in the provided views. The device is compact and lightweight, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and is designed for handheld use. Its surface is smooth and hard, with a glossy finish on the screen and a matte finish on the back.
description: A sleek, green smartphone with a large touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo on the back. The device has a smooth, matte finish and rounded corners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with app icons, a black bezel, and a top notch.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the slight camera bump on the back.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte green finish, centered silver Apple logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and uniform edge of the phone.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting with the matte green surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful wallpaper with a grid of app icons, including clock, calendar, photos, camera, maps, and settings, as well as a status bar at the top showing time and signal indicators.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, with three lenses arranged in a triangular pattern, each surrounded by a black ring.
attribute_button_layout: None visible in the provided views.
